summary: Seeded envelope. A smart ring that calls your daughter when grandma's heart rhythm flags afib — without her knowing she's wearing a med device. Live web research has not run yet; invoke 'npm run research -- --id wearables_smart_ring_for_seniors' to populate citations.

dead_saas_matches.rationale: Risk profile overlaps Lilium (Hardware scaling chasm; regulatory delays; capital intensity exceeded projections).
Risk profile overlaps Northvolt (Manufacturing execution failure; scaling complexity underestimated).
